GenAiFunction.description:
Read the information which user informed and pass to the class. We need to collect the ZipCode and need to pass the information to apex class and collect the response from the Apex class
Sample prompt 'What’s the weather forecast for zipcode 10001'
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: Weather Forecast based on Zip Code
GenAiFunction.progressIndicatorMessage: Please wait we are loading the information
